data.title: Cloud Integration
data.description: Microsoft.com uses Azure to seamlessly integrate cloud services, ensuring scalability and reliability.

data.title: Microservices
data.description: The site employs a microservices architecture to allow independent deployment and scalability of components.

data.title: Content Delivery Network
data.description: Utilizes a CDN to distribute content globally, enhancing load times and availability.

data.title: Database Management
data.description: Relies on distributed databases for managing large datasets efficiently.

data.title: Legacy System Integration
data.description: Supports integration with legacy systems to ensure continuity and data flow.
